subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! The love of the people of guidance is ancient and mighty, and in the spiritual realm its traces are enduring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست قدیما محبت اهل هدایت قدیمدر و عظیم در و جهان روحانیتده مستدیمدر آثاری
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @unity in diversity
